entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A complex environmental challenge involving long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that threatens agriculture and food security

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming, including cultivation of the soil for the growing of crops

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: CLIMATIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in the mean state and other statistics of the climate on all spatial and temporal scales

entities.name: GLOBAL TEMPERATURES
entities.description: The average temperature of the Earth's atmosphere and ocean

entities.name: SEA LEVEL
entities.description: The average level of the surface of Earth's oceans

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The degree of heat present in a system, specifically linked to agriculture productivity

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: Any form of water, liquid or solid, that falls from the atmosphere and reaches the ground, specifically linked to agriculture productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURE PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input, which is closely linked to climate

entities.name: LOW-INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with a low gross national income per capita where agricultural productivity is likely to decrease

entities.name: TROPICAL ZONES
entities.description: The region of the Earth surrounding the Equator where agricultural productivity is likely to decrease

entities.name: ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Biological communities of interacting organisms and their physical environment influenced by climate change

entities.name: HEALTH
entities.description: The state of being free from illness or injury, influenced by climate variability and change

entities.name: EXTREME EVENTS
entities.description: Severe and unusual weather events that negatively impact crop yields

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of excessive heat that negatively impacts crop yields

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of abnormally low rainfall that negatively impact crop yields

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: An overflow of water that submerges land and negatively impacts crop yields

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production harvested per unit area of land

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL AND FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of generating food through farming and livestock, negatively impacted by climate change

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country that is the focus of the systematic review on climate change effects
